scripts.dev:local: docker compose -f .docker/local/compose.yaml -f .docker/local/compose.dev.yaml up -d --build redis minio api worker && bun run dev:web
scripts.dev:backend: docker compose -f .docker/local/compose.yaml -f .docker/local/compose.dev.yaml up -d --build redis minio api worker
scripts.dev:backend:logs: docker compose -f .docker/local/compose.yaml -f .docker/local/compose.dev.yaml logs -f api worker redis minio
scripts.generate:theme-previews: echo 'Theme previews are static assets in apps/web/public/theme-previews'
